zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Eyton於1407年9月27日出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 史福斯波利時，她的父親Thomas Brosyard Eyton30歲，母親Sarah Foster24歲。她於大約1424年與William Fowke在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年在英國斯塔福爾布霍德享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Eyton于1407年9月27日出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 史福斯波利时，她的父亲Thomas Brosyard Eyton30岁，母亲Sarah Foster24岁。她于大约1424年与William Fowke在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年在英国斯塔福爾布霍德享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Eyton was born on 27 September 1407, in Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, her father, Thomas Brosyard Eyton, was 30 and her mother, Sarah Foster, was 24. She married William Fowke about 1424, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1448, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Eyton est née le 27 septembre 1407, à Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Brosyard Eyton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah Foster, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Fowke environ 1424, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Eyton am 27. September 1407 in Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Brosyard Eyton 30 und ihre Mutter Sarah Foster 24. Sie hat um 1424 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom William Fowke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Brewood, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Eyton è nata il il 27 settembre 1407 nel Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Brosyard Eyton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sarah Foster, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Fowke circa 1424, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1448, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Eytonが1407年9月27日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ネアル シュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Brosyard Eytonは30歳，母Sarah Fosterは24歳であった。約1424年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドでWilliam Fowkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Eyton(이)가 1407년 9월 27일 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Brosyard Eyton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Foster(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 William Fowke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Eyton nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1407, em Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Brosyard Eyton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Foster, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fowke aproximadamente 1424, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1448, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Eyton, , Shropshire, England: эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Eyton родилась 27 сентября 1407 г. в местности эитон нир шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Brosyard Eyton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Foster, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fowke около 1424 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Eyton nació el 27 de septiembre de 1407, en Eyton near Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Brosyard Eyton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sarah Foster, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William Fowke aproximadamente 1424, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1448, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
